case_title: ROY ROBINSON VS. BURGER KING HOLDINGS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, ROY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-20-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-10-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-07-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-18-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-20-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-20-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Plaintiff. Case Dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Continued To Jul-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to July 18, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

(610) Note: Plaintiff was in the courtroom when callendar commenced/Plaintiff was not in the courtroom when Judge called the case. (610)
